data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: OpenAI uses a microservices approach allowing independent deployment of services.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Built on scalable cloud platforms to handle extensive AI computation.

data.title: High Availability
data.description: Ensures minimal downtime and robust data handling via redundant systems.

data.title: API-Driven Architecture
data.description: Primary functionality is exposed via well-documented APIs.

data.title: Data-Driven Design
